inPlaceRotation.reason: Railway CLI 4.30.2 exposes no credential-rotation operation and immediate invalidation cannot be proven without using the compromised values.

recommendedOption: replace both data services, then retire the compromised services and volumes
gateRBlocker: Railway's default PostgreSQL and Redis templates create TCP proxies. The approved replacement procedure requires a proven private-only provisioning path before any replacement operation can be requested.
oldCredentialInvalidationProof: Do not test or retrieve the old values. Prove retirement by absence of the old service and volume IDs, absence of their private endpoints and references, and zero domains or TCP proxies.
